MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF GAUDENCIO NAJERA's MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff's unopposed motion to transfer venue is granted; plaintiff shall pay transfer fees.

Order signed.

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF GAUDENCIO NAJERA's Motion To Transfer Venue.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.
